title: Medieval-Craft (Medieval 16x + Moved!)
description: A resource pack that changes the textures to simple 16 x 16 medieval textures. X Fresh Animations!
body:
**IMPOSSIBLE BUGS, NOW REMAKING, EXPECT PRE-ALPHA SOON!**
# Chu-Index Presents: Medieval-Craft
> PS it's in Early beta and you've know that some textures changed and it might happen again such as: Grass, it Changed.
- Have you ever wanted a 16x16 Medieval Minecraft Resource pack? well HERE YOU GO. **MEDIEVAL PACK!** This resource pack changes a lot of textures to fit 16x16 Medieval days probably like 5th Gen to 15th Gen. (Totally not googled searched)

## Content
> - Re-Textures the blocks, items, entities, and pretty much everything else
> + Fresh Animations Support also. (Not Updated to 1.21.5)
> 
>    yeah that's it.


Link: **[Medieval-Craft 2.0](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/medieval-craft-2.0)** (Still under review)

### Notice
- I've been actually tracing not retexturing from scratch like I used to, so for the 100th Download I'm doing the whole starting from scratch! So, stayed tuned, and thank you for 100 downloads, I've been doing this for a few months so to the bottom of my heart, thank you.... God Bless You!

# Goal: Reach 5K Downloads Before 2026!
Help Me Reach This Goal by Downloading!
Also 500 Downloads will have a special

- Wandering Traders Updated! 1.21.5


![Save The Traders That Means You ACookieGod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aea1753253b6d66db282431711742ed07552323b.png)
